serviceDescription: Submit an unsigned transaction and its stated intent. VETO forks X Layer at the current block, executes the exact transaction, diffs intent against real effect, and returns ALLOW, WARN or VETO with a hash-committed evidence bundle and an on-chain attestation.
Audits every live token allowance a wallet has granted, scores each by drain exposure, and returns a ready-to-sign revocation transaction for the dangerous ones.
Screens an inbound task before an agent accepts it: prompt injection, credential extraction, embedded approval calldata, known drainer addresses, coercion and exfiltration patterns.
An evidence-graded trust ruling on any address or contract before an agent engages. Bytecode, code size, balance, history and drainer matching, all read live from X Layer.
Replays any historical X Layer transaction through the live rule pipeline and reports exactly what VETO would have ruled, with a post-mortem naming what caused the loss.
